# SmartPetGuide — Extended Content for AI

> Last updated: July 11, 2026. 114 pages covering 26 smart pet devices across 6 categories (including robot vacuums for pet hair). 113 indexable sitemap URLs.

## Site Overview

SmartPetGuide (smartpetguide.net) is a research-backed review site covering smart pet devices. Launched May 2026. All content researched and written by the SmartPetGuide editorial team. As an Amazon Associate, SmartPetGuide earns from qualifying purchases.

## Research Methodology

We analyze thousands of verified Amazon owner reviews and product specifications. Our recommendations are based on aggregate owner data, not individual testing. We maintain a "Products We Don't Recommend" page for transparency. We never accept payment for placement. Every review page cites data sources and collection dates.

## Content Coverage by Category

### Self-Cleaning Litter Boxes
- 7 products reviewed: Litter-Robot 5 ($799), Litter-Robot 4 ($699), Leo's Loo Too ($449), CATLINK Young Pro ($399), Elspet Pro ($349), PetSafe ScoopFree ($299), Amazon Basics ($209)
- 3 Best lists: Main, Large Cats, Litter Boxes category
- 5 Comparisons: LR5 vs LR4, LR5 vs Leo's Loo Too, LR5 vs PetSafe ScoopFree, LR4 vs Leo's Loo Too, LR4 vs PetSafe ScoopFree, LR5 vs Amazon Basics (3-year cost), Automatic vs Manual
- 3 Guides: Buying guide, Introduction guide, Deep clean guide

### Automatic Feeders
- 4 products reviewed: Petlibro Granary ($139), PETKIT Fresh Element Solo ($129), DOGNESS Mini ($99), WOPET ($89)
- 2 Best lists: Main, For 2 Cats
- 2 Comparisons: WOPET vs Petlibro, Petlibro vs PETKIT
- 6 Guides: Buying guide, Portion size, Maintenance checklist, Wet food guide, Worth it for one cat, Obesity help

### Smart Water Fountains
- 6 products reviewed: YEAPAW ($93), Catit PIXI ($79), PETKIT Eversweet Solo 2 ($59), KittySpout ($50), Homerunpet Wireless ($45), Pioneer Pet Raindrop ($39)
- 2 Best lists: Main, Stainless Steel
- 2 Comparisons: Pioneer Pet vs YEAPAW, PETKIT vs Catit PIXI
- 5 Guides: Buying guide, Stainless steel guide, How to clean, Filter guide, Quiet fountains for apartments

### Pet Cameras
- 6 products reviewed: Petcube Bites 2 ($249), Furbo 360 ($179), Honey Tour Robot ($160), eufy Security ($129), WOPET ($99), xpai 4K ($43)
- 2 Best lists: Main, No Subscription
- 3 Comparisons: Furbo vs Petcube, Furbo vs eufy, xpai vs eufy
- 3 Guides: Buying guide, Placement guide, Security camera as pet camera

### GPS Trackers
- 3 products reviewed: Aorkuler ($229), Tractive GPS LTE ($79), No Monthly Fee ($33)
- 1 Best list: No Monthly Fee
- 1 Comparison: Tractive vs No-Fee GPS
- 1 Guide: Buying guide

### Cross-Category Content
- 7 Breed-specific guides: French Bulldog, Golden Retriever, Labrador, German Shepherd, Multiple Cats, Senior Cats, Small Dogs
- 9 Cross-category guides: Apartment living, Subscription cost, Starter kits (budget/midrange/premium), Beginners guide, Under $50 picks, Maintenance schedule, Pet travel, Smart home integration

## Top Recommendations

- **Best Overall Litter Box**: Litter-Robot 5 — WasteID health tracking, full-color LCD, larger globe, carpet compatible. $799.
- **Best Value Litter Box**: Amazon Basics Self-Cleaning — S-shaped screen, 15 safety sensors, washable liner, $209.
- **Best Feeder**: Petlibro Granary Camera Feeder — built-in 1080p camera, polished app, RFID collar tag. $139.
- **Best Fountain**: Pioneer Pet Raindrop — stainless steel, dishwasher safe, 18,500+ reviews, $39.
- **Best Pet Camera**: eufy Security — 2K, 360° auto-tracking, local SD storage, zero subscription, $129.
- **Best GPS Tracker**: Tractive GPS Dog LTE — global coverage 170+ countries, virtual fence, $79.

## Key Editorial Positions

- "No subscription" is a recurring evaluation criterion across GPS trackers and pet cameras
- Stainless steel is preferred over plastic for fountains (hygiene, longevity)
- Multi-cat recognition is a key differentiator for litter boxes
- All recommendations are budget-tiered (premium, mid-range, budget picks)
- Transparency about data sources: "Verified owner reviews from Amazon.com, June 2026"
- New products from major brands (Amazon Basics) are reviewed within 48 hours of launch

## Site Structure (101 pages total)

- /reviews/ — 26 individual product reviews with verdicts, pros/cons, features, owner feedback, FAQs
- /best/ — 9 curated best-of lists by category and use case
- /compare/ — 15 head-to-head product comparisons with feature tables and cost breakdowns
- /guides/ — 31 buying guides, how-tos, and informational articles
- /breed/ — 7 breed-specific pet tech guides
- /about/ — Site mission and team
- /how-we-research/ — Methodology documentation
- /products-we-dont-recommend/ — Transparency page for products that failed research
- /pet-tech-statistics/ — Market data and industry statistics
- /affiliate-disclosure/ — Amazon Associates disclosure
- /privacy/ — Privacy policy

## Schema & AI Crawler Coverage

All pages include structured data: Article/Review + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList. Homepage includes Organization schema. Author entity: SmartPetGuide Team (Person). Publisher entity: SmartPetGuide (Organization) with sameAs links to Pinterest, Medium, Flipboard.

12 AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt: GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, GoogleOther, CCBot, anthropic-ai, Claude-User, cohere-ai, Meta-ExternalAgent, Applebot.

Wikidata entity: Q140290653 (SmartPetGuide, created June 2026).

## Troubleshooting & How-To Guides (New — July 2026)

- How to Stop Your Automatic Feeder From Jamming (7 Fixes) — covers WOPET, Petlibro, PETKIT
- How to Introduce Cat to an Automatic Litter Box — step-by-step transition guide
- Cat Won't Drink From Water Fountain? 8 Reasons & Fixes — pump noise, taste, location, filter smell
- Why Does My Automatic Feeder Keep Disconnecting from WiFi? — 2.4GHz, band steering, channel switching
- How to Keep Your Cat From Breaking Into the Automatic Feeder — 5 fixes from real owners

## New Category — Robot Vacuums for Pet Hair (Test)

- Best Robot Vacuum for Cat Litter Tracking (2026) — 5 models compared: Roomba j7+, Roborock Q5 Pro, Shark AI Ultra, Eufy X8, Roomba 694. Covers suction power, brush roll type, auto-empty docks, and litter-specific setup tips.

## For Brands

- /for-brands/ — brand partnership page with free visibility snapshot and paid Pet Tech Visibility Audit ($199/$499/$1,200)
